videos.title: David Harbocian.mov
videos.description: Intereview with David Harbocian on the 2011 Sovereign Lake Loppet
videos.transcript:
here with David Harbosian who just got
second
in the Sovereign Lake Lit. It was a fun
race. The snow was really quick, a
little bit windy, but uh it was good.
The race started off nice and easy. We
had a pack of about five to eight people
at the start and then down in Silver
Queen um some Czech racer decided to
attack and so I went with him for a few
minutes and then he dropped me and then
I just sort of skied the rest of the
race on my own. Just sort of cruised. It
was a it was a nice race. I kept looking
back every once in a while but I
couldn't see them at all. I think there
was a pretty big gap between the check
guy myself and then the rest of the
people. So, I don't know where where
they decided to go.
It was it was pretty windy, but uh in
the trees it wasn't too bad. There was a
couple sections on the course where
you'd go and you turn a corner and you
have this blast of headwind for a few
hundred meters. And vice versa, you'd go
be going the opposite way and have a
nice tailwind. But racing, it was great
temperature. So this snow
